_comment: Small P3 layout-fidelity eval set. Each scene = a base prompt + an expected layout (the geometry engine's bins). layout_runner generates each WITH and WITHOUT the layout clause and VLM-judges both; the lift is whether geometry steering helps.

scenes.name: lighthouse-coast
scenes.prompt: A storybook illustration of a rocky coastline at golden hour, soft watercolour.

scenes.name: market-square
scenes.prompt: A hand-drawn medieval market square at midday, bustling with people.
